name: git
description: Git operation tools for UTCP agents.

tools.name: git.diff
tools.description: Return the unified diff for the working tree or staged changes.

path.description: Restrict diff to this file path (optional).

staged.description: Show staged (index) diff instead of working-tree diff.

tools.name: git.status
tools.description: Return the short-format working tree status.

tools.name: git.apply_patch
tools.description: Apply a unified diff patch to the repository.

tools.name: git.commit_message
tools.description: Inspect staged changes and return a conventional-commit suggestion, affected files, and diff stats.
